title: Core Ethical Concepts for AI Policy
description: A visual breakdown of the foundational ethical principles from Module 5's first book and their application in public policy frameworks.
elements: Core AI Principles (e.g., Fairness, Accountability, Transparency)
Societal Impact Goals (e.g., Public Trust, Safety, Equity)
relationships: Core principles are operationalized through policy instruments
Policy instruments aim to achieve positive societal impact goals
